summary: Recent updates to the WebRTC web API, which enables real-time communication like video calls, have focused on improving its performance and capabilities. Notably, a new feature has been added to track **key frames in video streams**, which will enhance the way video quality is monitored during calls by providing important statistics about keyFramesEncoded. Additionally, updates to the RTCRtcpParameters will improve how session control information is described, specifically the **cname** (Canonical Name) and reducedSize fields, which help ensure smoother connectivity and management of media streams. These enhancements collectively contribute to making real-time communication more efficient and reliable for users._
